ENGLISH: In $YEAR$, a dozen of Greco-Coptic farmers crossed the border, claiming the land as theirs' and raiding some Misri villages. As the Greco-Coptic government refused to give explanations and allow investigation, war was seemingly inevitable.
Those cowards will learn when one should talk or be silent.

The sacred ruins of Koltsovo had been untouched by humans since the times of the Storm. Old sayings affirmed that those who disrupt its calm will awaken a curse upon all mankind. In $YEAR$ a group of scientists foolishly enter the place, and PUPPETd a plague which will be know until the next century as "Ozpox".
Authorities have confirmed the presence of Ozpox in $PROVINCENAME$, with dozens already infected. While emergency measures are being enacted, the means by which the disease spreads are still unknown.
We can only hope the best...
In recent days, a new disease known as "Ozpox" has been reported to be present in the country. The extent to which this plague has spread remains unknown.

It has been discovered that several foreigners within our borders are infected with a new disease known as "Ozpox". As the nature and capabilities of this disease remain unknown, we should begin taking precautionary measures.

The impact of Ozpox upon our nation has been devastating. Medical authorities now report thousands of cases across the country. In response, the cabinet has concluded that drastic measures are unavoidable, including the closure of our borders and the prohibition of public gatherings.

A cloud of darkness is threatening our nation, and we cannot allow ourselves to be consumed by it. The rapid spread of the Ozpox disease has forced us to confront a danger unlike any we have faced before. As infection crosses borders and endangers our people, the state must act decisively.\n\nTherefore, $COUNTRY$ has resolved to close its borders in order to safeguard the survival of the nation.
For the well-being of the people.

Now that our country can be declared free of Ozpox, there is no longer a need for quarantine and other policies, and they will be lifted. Nevertheless, strict border controls will remain in place to safeguard the health of the nation.
Now that Ozpox has ceased to be a major threat, the government has decided to repeal all policies enacted under the state of emergency.

Recently, a group of scientists working in our colonies has discovered that Ozpox has a significantly milder effect on the local population. Through further research, they have identified a closely related disease that has existed for generations among jungle communities.\n\nThe research team believes that this natural exposure may hold the key to developing a cure that could give us international prestige. However, they warn that substantial funding will be required to continue their work.
Is too uncertain for the expense.
Vaccine Researchers Ask for More Budget
The research team responsible for the development of the Ozpox vaccine has submitted a request for additional funding, promising that their findings are in the right way.
Ensuring their work is vital for our nation.
We can provide limited support, for now.
Money does not grow on trees...

Today, the $COUNTRY_ADJ$ Ozpox Vaccine Research Team has published its findings on the development of an Ozpox vaccine. The study reveals that, in certain regions of Africa, a virus closely related to the one responsible for Ozpox has long existed among local populations.\n\nResearchers have determined that exposure to the pustules caused by this related virus significantly strengthens the body's defenses against Ozpox. By carefully replicating this process under controlled conditions, scientists have confirmed it is possible to induce immunity without the severe effects of the disease itself.

Ozpox, a highly contagious disease caused by the Variola virus, is estimated to have claimed close to 100 million lives during the 29th century. Only with the extensive vaccination campaigns of the 30th century was it finally declared eradicated in the year 3003. Yet such a future means nothing to you, people of the year $YEAR$. Despite your partial immunity, the Ozpox ghost still roams your world.
Do whatever we can. Every life is precious!
Weak and unable to resist, you say?

As a consequence of the recent conference concerning the trade and colonization of Africa, it has been decided that a new conference will be convened to deliberate on the future of the Ma'ibeli Empire.\n\nThe conference will be attended by representatives of several nations involved in the colonization of Africa (including ourselves), as well as other interested powers. Its primary purpose will be to discuss the political and economic future of the Ma'ibeli Empire, and to define its prospective relationship with the wider international community.
We must ensure the best future for the Ma'ibeli Empire.

The Protocol of Progress and Culturization in the Ma'ibeli Empire, commonly known as the Ma'ibeli Conference, was a diplomatic summit held in $YEAR$ to discuss the future of the Ma'ibeli Empire. The main points of discussion concern the abolition of slavery, the establishment of free trade, the implementation of a mass education program, and the concession of ports throughout the empire. The members of the conference expect us to accept all these terms. However, in the end, the final decision rests with us.\n\n We must carefully consider the implications of our choice, as a negative response could lead to agression towards us.
We must accept the terms of the conference. It is the best option for our future.
We do not agree with some of the terms, but are willing to compromise.

After careful consideration, we have decided to accept the terms of the Ma'ibeli Conference. We believe that this is the best course of action for our future, as it will allow us to maintain a positive relationship with the powers involved in the colonization of Africa. We are committed to working together with our partners to ensure a prosperous future for all.
Surely this is the best path forward.

The port of Assab, located near the capital of the Ma'ibeli Empire, is the most important port in East Africa, as it lies at the crossroads between the Red Sea and the Indian Ocean, as well as being the gate of the Aksum Lake. As the leading power of the Ma'ibeli Conference, we are the ones who will receive the concession of this strategic port.
We are glad to receive this concession.

The port of Massawa, located in the province of Eritrea, is the second most important port of the Ma'ibeli Empire along the Red Sea coast. As part of the arrangements discussed during the Ma'ibeli Conference, the concession of this port is now to be granted to us.

The province of Berbera, located near the Gulf of Aden, is considered the leading fishing city of the Ma'ibeli Empire. Under the agreements reached at the Ma'ibeli Conference, the concession of Berbera will be transferred to our control.

The province of Bosaso, being the farthest port in continental Ma'ibeli, having a considerable ammount of population, is relevant for trade and commerce in the east provinces of Ma'ibeli. During the Ma'ibeli Conferences this province has been granted to us.

The Socotran Archipelago, situated in the Western Arabian Sea, holds great strategic importance for controlling maritime traffic between the Red Sea and the Indian Ocean. This islands are conceded to us under the terms of the Ma'ibeli Conference.

The port of Mogadishu, situated in the Coast of Pepper, its the most important port in the south of Ma'ibeli Empire, as it connects East and South Africa with the Indian Ocean, which make it relevant for international trade. In accordance with the agreements reached at the Ma'ibeli Conference, the concession of Mogadishu will be entrusted to us.

The Ma'ibeli Empire has expressed its dissagreement with some of the terms of the Ma'ibeli conference, particularly those related to the free movement of people and the concession of ports. However, they have also stated that they are willing to compromise and work together with us to find a solution that benefits both parties. We, as the leading power of the Ma'ibeli Conference, have the choice to either accept their proposal (risking relations with the other powers) or reject it and do a military intervention to enforce the terms of the conference.
They are not in a position to negotiate.
We should accept their proposal and work together to find a solution.

As the intervention in the Ma'ibeli Empire has been successful, the Treaty of Typsbien has been signed between the Ma'ibeli Empire and the powers involved in the conference. This treaty ensures the implementation of the terms agreed upon during the Ma'ibeli Conference, as well as the division of the Ma'ibeli Empire into several zones of influence.
This treaty is a great achievement for our nation.

The foreigners have not been able to achieve their military goals in our lands, and the Ma'ibeli Empire has been able to maintain its sovereignty. As a result, the Treaty of Ma'ibeli City has been signed between the Ma'ibeli Empire and the powers involved in the conference. This treaty ensures the respect of the sovereignty of the Ma'ibeli Empire. Their failure has given us access to a new world of technologies which will boost our development efforts.
As part of the Treaty of Typsbien, has been decided that the province of Eritrea will be conceded to us.
As part of the Treaty of Typsbien, has been decided that the province of North Somaliland will be conceded to us.
As part of the Treaty of Typsbien, has been decided that the province of South Somaliland will be conceded to us.
As part of the Treaty of Typsbien, has been decided that the port of Mogadishu will be conceded to us.
As part of the Treaty of Typsbien, has been decided that the Socotran Archipelago will be conceded to us.
As part of the Treaty of Typsbien, and as the leader of the Ma'ibeli Conference, we are the indicated power to control the Ma'ibeli Empire main provinces.
As part of the Treaty of Typsbien, and for being the owners of Eritrea, has been decided that the provinces of Sudan will be conceded to us.

Negotiations with the Ma'ibeli Empire have been successful, and we have reached an agreement that allows us to maintain a positive relationship with them while also ensuring our interests in the region. Now in the discussion of the share of influence with the other powers, we have the opportunity to secure a favorable position for ourselves (buying colonies and territory), or share the influence between all the parts involved.
We are the right ones to lead the reformation of the Ma'ibeli Empire
We should share the influence with the other powers.

The Ma'ibeli Conference has been concluded, and all the terms declared has been accepted. Now that we sell our colonies and won the favor of a great power, we can expect a bright future for our nation meanwhile we choose the correct path.
We have made the right choice for our future.

The Ma'ibeli Conference has been concluded, and all the terms declared has been accepted. Now that we have secured our influence in the region, we can expect a bright future for our nation meanwhile we choose the correct path.
We have made the right choice for our future.

The Ma'ibeli Conference has been called, and we owns territories in the Ma'ibeli Empire. The conference powers thinks we should bring back the province to Ma'ibeli, but we have the choice to either accept this proposal or reject it and risk a military conflict.
We will cede the province to Ma'ibeli.
Our might won't be questioned by this.
$FROMCOUNTRY$ Refuses to Bring Back the Province

Diplomats from $FROMCOUNTRY$ have informed us their refusal to cooperate with the Ma'ibeli Conference and we have two choices: Either we can accept their decision and let them keep the province, or we can declare war on them to enforce the terms of the conference.
We will let them keep the province.
$FROMCOUNTRY$ Refuses to Bring Back the Province

Diplomats from $FROMCOUNTRY$ have informed us their refusal to cooperate with the terms discussed in the Treaty of Typsbien and we have two choices: Either we can accept their decision and let them keep the province, or we can declare war on them to enforce the terms of the treaty.

The Ma'ibeli Empire has been overthrown by a rebel faction, and the new government has expressed its desire to renegotiate the terms of the Ma'ibeli Conference. This new government is more hostile towards us, and we have the choice to intervene with the other powers to restore order (risking our legitimacy as the leader of the conference), or intervene alone to enforce the terms of the conference
We, as the leaders, will intervene alone.

The Ma'ibeli Conference leader has sent us a message: We must cede to the Ma'ibeli Empire all the provinces that are under our administration following the accords reached in the Ma'ibeli Conference, not acting so risk the worsen of relations and a severe escalation.
We accept the transfer of provinces.
Once more we have show our might, and as the Ma'ibeli conference's leader we receive what its promised to us.
For the pride of our nation!
We lost the war, and now is our obligation secede the provinces according to the peace treaty reached with $FROMCOUNTRY$.

The delegation we have sent to the Ma'ibeli Conference came back with the hands empty, as they only have reached the right to install an embassy in Ma'ibeli City. This humiliation weakens our global reputation.
As the foreigners declared war on us, we have quickly overrun them and retaken control of the concessions.

Now that the Ma'ibeli Empire has been stabilized and the emperor has been restored to the throne by our intervention, we have demonstrated our power and influence in the region. We could assure our leadership in the Ma'ibeli Conference, and will be recognized as the dominant power in the region. The next step is the negotiation for the future of the Ma'ibeli Empire.

Having won the civil war, our struggle cannot end here. This is only the beginning of the mission for which so many have given their lives: To free the continent from despotic regimes, from ruthless kings. Adelante!\n- Alfredo Fernandez Rouco, $YEAR$

In 2843, Alfredo Fernandez Rouco died of Crown Flu in the National Palace. His passing marked the end of a revolutionary chapter in the nation's history.\n\nWith his death came the birth of a democratic era built upon the ideals he and other national heroes fought for, and the continent-wide dream he entrusted to us. Mexica mourned a hero, but rose to honor him not with statues, but with a nation that finally belonged to its people.
His memory will live on in our hearts.

Today, multiple uprisings have been reported in the northern provinces, where the new opposition party "Restauración Nacional" holds regional power. Its leaders argue that the recent decisions made both inside and outside the country have brought harm rather than prosperity to the nation.
The Dream of Rouco will never die!

The policies pursued by Alfredo Fernandez and his party are harming the integrity of the nation. Their latest failures have been like a dagger cutting through our society, proving that El Liberado, rather than a party working for the good of our people, has become a tyrannical and bloodthirsty faction that must be overthrown.
Now that we are show our dominance over the Mexikan territories, we can assured that us and only us are the rightful governors of Mexika.
A day of glory for our nation.

After defeating the Jose Alvarez's regime, El Liberado, a liberal order established in Oaxaca is waging wars against autocracies and recently have conquered neighbouring territory.\nWhile some politicians are akin to Liberado's cause and think we should unite to them, others argue that their ideals are a complete delusion. What should we do?
This is a thread which can't be ignored.
We desire them good luck and extend our help if required.
A delegation from the Riograndese Republic arrived days ago, not in defiance, but in solidarity. They came with a clear message: their desire to join in our struggle to liberate the continent.

Reports of skirmishes have surfaced along the Riograndese frontier. Whistleblowers claim that their congress views our aspirations as too radical, labeling us a threat to their people. The time has come to respond decisively.
Those who stand against our cause are a danger that must be eliminated.
A few days ago, a Riograndese delegation arrived in the capital (representing the republic in our northern border). Their goal is to establish diplomatic ties and explore avenues for cooperation.
A sister republic can only be our ally.
We do not need their aid. Expel the delegation!

In recent days, some Texas politicians have called upon us to intervene in their conflict over New Tulsa, territory now held by the Pawnee. It may also present as an opportunity to establish a republican government in those lands. Only congress holds the power to decide.
We don't need bad relations with our neighbors.

Untouched by centuries, the Naukograds were places of advance and progress in pre-stormic times. While locals think those are sacred and nobody should disturb their calm, we think they are a great opportunity for boost our technological advance efforts.
As Ozpox represents a global emergency that threatens our nation, closing our borders has become a necessary measure to preserve national security as long as possible.
Ozpox is now in our country, we must declare a strict quarantine to prevent the collapse of the nation.

Historically, the lands beyond the Ponoman Strait are ruled by barbaric and despotic monarchs, who for decades have oppressed their people and wielded them as tools for imperial ambition. Our duty is to bring liberty and peace to Andia, once an for all.

Historically, the lands beyond the Ponoman Strait are ruled by barbaric and despotic monarchs, who for decades have oppressed their people and wielded them as tools for imperial ambition. Our duty is to bring liberty and peace to Andia, once an for all.

Historically, the lands beyond the Ponoman Strait are ruled by barbaric and despotic monarchs, who for decades have oppressed their people and wielded them as tools for imperial ambition. Our duty is to bring liberty and peace to Andia, once an for all.

Now our people live in freedom, progress, and democracy. But peace is never permanent, and we are not immune to the ambitions of empires beyond our shores. Only through unity can we defend what we've built and ensure that our future remains in our hands.

Now our people live in freedom, progress, and democracy. But peace is never permanent, and we are not immune to the ambitions of empires beyond our shores. Only through unity can we defend what we've built and ensure that our future remains in our hands.

Now our people live in freedom, progress, and democracy. But peace is never permanent, and we are not immune to the ambitions of empires beyond our shores. Only through unity can we defend what we've built and ensure that our future remains in our hands.

While our people now enjoy freedom from north to south, one final link remains before we can declare total victory. The Kingdom of Transpacifica has long stood as a threat to our goals. Now that we hold the upper hand, we must take the final step and depose the Pacifican King.
Ozpox is now on every corner of our nation, we have declared a National Emergency.
For saving the health of our nation, we have decided to temporarily isolate the country.
Our country has discovered the first vaccine against the Ozpox disease.
A disease is threatening the national health and we have enacted a quarantine.
Alfredo Fernandez Rouco is the leader of El Liberado, the first president of the nation.

In the 28th and 29th century, an estimated ten million people died from the Clover Infection, a disease characterized by the spontaneous onset of nausea, vomiting, fever, hair loss, and eventual death within a matter of weeks. The illness was reportedly caused by contact with objects bearing a clover symbol. By the way, haven't you seen this brilliant dust?

For nearly two centuries, the lands of Mexica have been engulfed in chaos since the fall of the central monarchy. In 2791, Jose Alvarez was elected President of Mexica, bringing stability to the region. A final constitution was ratified in 2819, consolidating his reforms. However, in 2835, after his eleventh reelection as president, a radical faction known as El Liberado seized control of the southern provinces, plunging the country into civil war.

For nearly two centuries, the lands of Mexica have been engulfed in chaos since the fall of the central monarchy. In 2835, the President of Mexica, Jose Alvarez, was elected by popular vote by a margin of nearly 90 points, in comparison to his opposition. This election marked his 11th four year term, as president, in line with the constitution, written by Alvarez in 2819. This was despite the cruel reign over the people of Mexica, and a detrimental foreign policy isolating its lands. While there were those of the upper class that benefited from his rule, his reign had long sickened the radical Liberado faction to the south. By 2835, they had fully taken the south from Alvarez's control, and engulfed the state into a full blown civil war. ˇViva El Liberado!

The Universidad Autonoma de Mexico were once the greatest university in our nation. Ciudad Universitaria, its principal campus, was previously used by the Alvarez regime as their main quarter and now is abandoned. Our duty is retake the campus and make efforts to revive the international prestige of the UNAM.
